# Python Assignment — Part 3: File I/O, APIs & Exception Handling

## Overview
A **Product Explorer & Error-Resilient Logger** that fetches real product data from a public API, processes it, writes results to files, and handles all failure scenarios gracefully.

## Tasks
| Task | Description | Marks |
|------|-------------|-------|
| 1 | File Read & Write Basics | 6 |
| 2 | API Integration (DummyJSON) | 8 |
| 3 | Exception Handling | 7 |
| 4 | Logging to File | 4 |

## Generated Files
- `python_notes.txt` — written and appended by the script
- `error_log.txt` — accumulates timestamped error entries across runs

## How to Run
```bash
pip install requests
python part3_api_files.py
```

## Requirements
- Python 3.8+
- `requests` library
